lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Do you want a lit candle for 1000 gold?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I don't have that kind of money on me.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Well then, no candle for you!

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Here you go then.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: I should warn you, though, it can be dangerous to take a naked flame down there. You'd be better off making a lantern.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's so dangerous about a naked flame?

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Heh heh... You'll find out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One thousand gold?!

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Look, you're not going to be able to survive down that hole without a light source.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: So you could go off to the candle shop to buy one more cheaply. You could even make your own lantern, which is a lot better.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: But I bet you want to find out what's down there right now, don't you? And you can pay me 1000 gold for the privilege!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right, you win, I'll buy a candle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you make lanterns?

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Out of glass. The more advanced lanterns have a metal component as well.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Firstly you can make a simple candle lantern out of glass. It's just like a candle, but the flame isn't exposed, so it's safer.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Then you can make an oil lamp, which is brighter but has an exposed flame. But if you make an iron frame for it you can turn it into an oil lantern.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Finally there's the bullseye lantern. You'll need to make a frame out of steel and add a glass lens.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Once you've made your lamp or lantern, you'll need to make lamp oil for it. The chemist near Rimmington has a machine for that.

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: For any light source, you'll need a tinderbox to light it. Keep your tinderbox handy in case it goes out!

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: But if all that's too complicated, you can buy a candle right here for 1000 gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right, you win, I'll buy a candle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'd rather curse the darkness.

sections.title: After learning about lanterns from the candle seller

lines.speaker: Candle seller
lines.text: Do you want a lit candle for 1000 gold?
